# Node.js
node_modules/
npm-debug.log*
yarn-debug.log*
yarn-error.log*
pnpm-debug.log*

# Environment variables
.env
.env.local
.env.development.local
.env.test.local
.env.production.local

# Logs
logs
*.log

# Runtime data
pids
*.pid
*.seed

# Instrumented libs generated by jscoverage/JSCover
lib-cov

# Coverage directory used by tools like istanbul
coverage
*.lcov

# nyc test coverage
.nyc_output

# Grunt intermediate storage (https://gruntjs.com/)
.grunt

# Bower intermediate storage (https://bower.io/)
.bower

# Dependency directories
jspm_packages

# TypeScript v1 declaration files
typings

# TypeScript cache
*.tsbuildinfo

# Optional npm cache directory
.npm

# Optional eslint cache
.eslintcache

# Microbundle cache
.rpt2cache
.rts2cache_cs
.rts2cache_ts
.rts2cache_js

# Built files that should be removed
dist
build

# Environment variables template (keep this but don't commit actual .env)
.env.example

# Vitest cache
.vitest

# Laravel cache and logs
/bootstrap/cache/*
storage/logs/*
storage/framework/cache/*
storage/framework/views/*
storage/framework/sessions/*

# Vercel
.vercel
output/

# Legacy files
pastryjs.json
